title: Theories of leadership
summary: 9609 A Level — trait, behavioural, and situational leadership theories.
learningObjectives: Evaluate theory fit for case leaders.

simpleExplanation.title: How leaders lead
simpleExplanation.summary: Theories explain whether leaders are born, trained, or must adapt style to the situation and team maturity.

sections.content: **Leadership theories** (7.3.2) — name **theorist/style** and **apply to case CEO**.
